target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Building facade extensively missing; roof collapsed; debris pile covers ground level; structural framing appears intact but non-load-bearing elements completely destroyed; damage exceeds 75% of visible target element area.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: The target building shows complete collapse of its upper structure; debris piles at ground level; structural framing is missing; visible absence of roof and upper walls; consistent with 75-100% damage per doctrinal definition for framed buildings.

summary: Two buildings assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence, both showing complete collapse of upper structures and debris piles; the overall scene depicts a street flanked by heavily damaged, partially collapsed buildings with rubble and a single intact car parked in the foreground; the functional impact is likely severe, with buildings rendered uninhabitable and infrastructure compromised.
